items.notes: Confirmed: 15-value array [0,1,3,6,12,18,24,36,48,60,72,84,96,108,120]. Maps to prediction module constant.
Corrected to eGFR 12 (was 15). All PRD and code references updated.
Race-free, sex-free population-average coefficients. Full pseudocode provided.
BUN-adjusted linear decline. Base rates by CKD stage + BUN modifier formula provided.
Exponential saturation curve replaces prior step-up model. PHASE1_COEFF = 0.31.
Logarithmic accumulation. Tier-specific gains: +8.0 / +6.0 / +4.0 eGFR pts.
Full per-point calculation provided. Ready for Python implementation.
NEW output: bun_suppression_estimate field added to /predict response. Powers stat card.
3 golden-file vectors with exact outputs (±0.2 tolerance). Covers Stage 3a, 3b, and 5.
Deferred to post-MVP (Tier 2). Hemoglobin, CO2, albumin modify decline rate. Not in Sprint 2-3 scope.
Acknowledged. Potassium removed from all input references. Required inputs: BUN, creatinine, age.
Acknowledged. All references updated from eGFR 15 to eGFR 12. Chart threshold line and dial_ages use 12.
